name: Mushrooms with Mint and Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Portobello Mushrooms (or Crimini Mushrooms), wiped clean, sliced
1 large Tomato, peeled and seeded, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil and stock in a skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and garlic; cover and simmer until soft and brown, 8-9 minutes.
3. Add tomato; cook for an additional 1 minute.
4. Stir in lemon juice, mint, salt, and pepper.
5. Remove from heat, drain any excess liquid, and serve at room temperature.
